reviews.review_title: I really wanted to play but alas
reviews.review_description: I want to give it 5 stars but I can not in its current condition, if it gets fix I will gladly change my review, but as of now I would get to a point and then could not interact with anything not items shelves or customers so I would look over the comments  before purchasing and I REALLY hope the seven are still working on this game to improve its playability please and thank you
Has glitches it won’t let you scan items game seems as though it would be fun but it needs updates needs to be fix

Purchased this game with really high hopes, for a not expensive game this has great potential however there are some  issues i cant change the price on anything no matter what i do it just doesnt work and this is in only tutorial mode so i cant procress untill this bug is fixed maybe an update id even pay for one...
Can't take any payment I've uninstalled the game updated my VR cleared the history and still it doesn't work

reviews.review_title: Wanted to love it, but too many problems
reviews.review_description: The game could be really fun if it weren't for the bugs. 50% of the time when you start out you can't ring up anything. Some of the small items can never be picked up, and you can't move on in the game if someone is in your line with any of those items. This was an early access game that was never completed. It's been 10 months since any kind of an update. I think when these companies abandon their games in early access they should have to refund everyone who bought. We bought the game expecting it to be completed. Very uncool.
This game needs some work. It is a struggle to interact with items or the register. I give it a 2 at most.

I was excited to try but I can’t even make it passed the tutorial.
I press A to try and accept the payment but nothing happens. 
I then try mashing other buttons hoping for something to happen but no luck. 
I should have read the reviews before purchasing.
PLEASE DO NOT MAKE MY MISTAKE!!!

developer_response.body: Thanks for report on this... we will for sure check that and fix in the next release

reviews.review_title: Can't use the fridge or freezer
reviews.review_description: I actually really enjoyed this game until I tried to put anything in the fridge or freezer... all it says is hit a to use but doesn't let me put any product in either one.... am I doing something wrong??? Until this is fixed it will be one star cause I can't actually play it

I got this game bc I play it on my phone and became obsessed so I was very excited the VR edition came out… but I don’t like how these controls work at all.. I was hoping you could physically GRAB all the boxes and items yourself instead of having to press A the whole time. Also, it’s annoying how you have to physically LOOK at items to use them. Please change these controls bc I love this game and I’d hate to delete it..

developer_response.body: Excellent! Thank you a lot for your great feedback! Yes, we will for sure do those changes and make them live within next couple weeks!

reviews.review_description: The controller is terrible, and I tried getting a refund, and it said I played it for over 2 hours, but I didn't even play it for one hour. DO NOT WASTE YOUR MONEY ON THIS GAME

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback and we just updated with a new version with better controling system

reviews.review_description: When I try and put my products in the fridge or freezer it won’t let me. This needs sorting asap!

developer_response.body: Thanks for report on this... issue is fixed with our latest release
